title: Businesses And Investors Wont Hold Their Breath Forever
section_path: Businesses And Investors Wont Hold Their Breath Forever
section_path_text: Businesses And Investors Wont Hold Their Breath Forever
summary:
Main
The three things businesses and investors need to know this morning
Market and business uncertainty does not seem to subside, as tariffs continue to shift fast
Some market dislocations (borrowing costs up, Dollar down) are suggesting that some market participants might be moving away from US risk assets as safe havens
As days pass, uncertainty may well be factor in as more long-term. This could cause markets and investors to seek "bubbles" of safety. By George Lagarias
---------------------------------------
Summary
As trade wars continue, business and investors are seeing volatility and uncertainty rise exponentially.

The three things businesses and investors need to know this morning
Market and business uncertainty does not seem to subside, as tariffs continue to shift fast
Some market dislocations (borrowing costs up, Dollar down) are suggesting that some market participants might be moving away from US risk assets as safe havens
As days pass, uncertainty may well be factor in as more long-term. This could cause markets and investors to seek "bubbles" of safety.
